  • Uses of ISymbolicLayout in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

    Classes in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution that implement ISymbolicLayout
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    SymbolicLayoutReader.KeYlessLayout
    An implementation of ISymbolicLayout which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution that return ISymbolicLayout
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected ISymbolicLayout
    SymbolicLayoutExtractor.createLayoutFromExecutionVariableValuePairs(ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> equivalentClasses, Set<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePair> pairs, String stateName)
    Creates an ISymbolicLayout which shows the objects, values and associations defined by the given AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExecutionVariableValuePairs.
    ISymbolicLayout
    ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode.getCurrentLayout(int configurationIndex)
    Returns the current memory layout which shows the memory structure before the current node in the symbolic execution tree is executed.
    ISymbolicLayout
    SymbolicLayoutExtractor.getCurrentLayout(int layoutIndex)
    Returns the current memory layout at the given index.
    ISymbolicLayout
    ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode.getInitialLayout(int configurationIndex)
    Returns the initial memory layout before the method was executed.
    ISymbolicLayout
    SymbolicLayoutExtractor.getInitialLayout(int layoutIndex)
    Returns the initial memory layout at the given index.
    protected ISymbolicLayout
    SymbolicLayoutExtractor.getLayout(Map<Integer,ISymbolicLayout> confiurationsMap, int layoutIndex, Set<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExtractLocationParameter> locations, String stateName, boolean currentLayout)
    Helper method of SymbolicLayoutExtractor.getInitialLayout(int) and SymbolicLayoutExtractor.getCurrentLayout(int) to lazily compute and get a memory layout.
    protected ISymbolicLayout
    SymbolicLayoutExtractor.lazyComputeLayout(ImmutableSet<JTerm> layout, Set<AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExtractLocationParameter> locations, ImmutableList<ISymbolicEquivalenceClass> equivalentClasses, String stateName, boolean currentLayout)
    Computes a memory layout lazily when it is first time requested via SymbolicLayoutExtractor.getLayout(java.util.Map<java.lang.Integer, de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.object_model.ISymbolicLayout>, int, java.util.Set<de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.AbstractUpdateExtractor.ExtractLocationParameter>, java.lang.String, boolean).
    ISymbolicLayout
    SymbolicLayoutReader.read(File file)
    Reads the given File.
    ISymbolicLayout
    SymbolicLayoutReader.read(InputStream in)
    Reads from the given InputStream and closes it.
    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution with parameters of type ISymbolicLayout
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.appendAssociation(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicAssociation association, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the given ISymbolicAssociation with its children to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.appendModel(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the given ISymbolicLayout with its children to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.appendObject(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicObject object, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the given ISymbolicObject with its children to the given StringBuilder.
    protected void
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.appendState(int level, ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicState state, StringBuilder sb)
    Appends the given ISymbolicState with its children to the given StringBuilder.
    protected String
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.computeObjectId(ISymbolicLayout model, ISymbolicObject object)
    Computes a unique ID for the given object in the given model.
    String
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.toXML(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding)
    Converts the given ISymbolicLayout into XML.
    void
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.write(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding, File file)
    Writes the given ISymbolicLayout as XML file.
    void
    SymbolicLayoutWriter.write(ISymbolicLayout model, String encoding, OutputStream out)
    Writes the given ISymbolicLayout into the OutputStream.
